import bisect


def find_cheapest_product(products: list[dict]) -> dict:
    return min(products, key=lambda p: p["price"])


def get_top_scorer(students: list[dict]) -> dict:
    return max(students, key=lambda s: s["score"])


def is_sorted_ascending(numbers: list[int]) -> bool:
    for i in range(len(numbers) - 1):
        if numbers[i] > numbers[i + 1]:
            return False
    return True


def has_duplicate(items: list[str]) -> bool:
    seen: set[str] = set()
    for item in items:
        if item in seen:
            return True
        seen.add(item)
    return False


def get_oldest_record(records: list[dict]) -> dict:
    return min(records, key=lambda r: r["created_at"])
